metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4786
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 2: ANK3 (ankyrin-G) co-localizes with Homer1b/c at postsynaptic densities of mouse primary cortical cultured neurons. Furthermore, ankyrin-G (ANK3) 190kDa, but not 270kDa, robustly coimmunoprecipitated with Homer1b/c in PSD-enriched fractions (Fig. 2b).. Experimental description: M&M: "Dissociated primary cortical cultured neurons were prepared from P0 C57BL/6J (The Jackson Laboratory)."

antibody:
mouse ankyrin-G (Neuromab; N106/36)
rabbit ankyrin-G (SantaCruz; sc-28561)

"3XHA-ankyrin-G (EX-Mm25668-M06) was purchased from GeneCopoeia. Three domain fragments of ankyrin-G (amino acids 1-807, 808-1475, 1476-1961) were amplified from 3XHA-ankyrin-G. GFP-tagged ankyrin-G was amplified from 3XHA-ankyrin-G, and subcloned into pEGFP-N2 (#6801-1; Clontech) using the Infusion ligation independent cloning kit (Clontech). The detailed information was described previously [26, 27]."
